description: An analyst must apply a critical vulnerability patch to the Linux kernel on hundreds of production servers without rebooting them.

nodes.task_description: Identify all servers that require the live kernel patch.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst has a complete list of target servers.

nodes.task_description: Use a live patching tool (e.g., kpatch, KernelCare) to deploy the patch to all affected servers in memory.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully deploys the patch without requiring a system reboot.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the patch is active on all servers and that they are no longer vulnerable.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst confirms the live patch has successfully remediated the vulnerability across the fleet.
